description: A high-end modern music studio website serving as a marketing portfolio, song/gear catalog, and an e-commerce platform for digital audio products.

hierarchy.h1: text-5xl md:text-6xl+ font-black tracking-tighter leading-none text-white
hierarchy.label: text-xs font-bold uppercase tracking-[0.2em] text-[#52525B]

surface_styles.card_default: bg-[#0A0A0C] border border-white/10 rounded-2xl overflow-hidden transition-all duration-300
surface_styles.input_field: bg-[#050505] border border-white/10 text-white focus:border-[#E11D48] focus:ring-1 focus:ring-[#E11D48] rounded-lg

navigation.rules: Must remain sticky at the top with z-50. Include Logo on the left, centered links (Home, Songs, Gear, Shop), and a primary CTA (Login/Cart) on the right. Never transparent.

buttons.primary: bg-[#E11D48] text-white font-semibold rounded-full px-6 py-3 hover:bg-[#BE123C] transition-colors
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent border border-white/20 text-white font-semibold rounded-full px-6 py-3 hover:bg-white/5 transition-colors
buttons.play_button: w-12 h-12 rounded-full bg-[#E11D48] flex items-center justify-center hover:scale-105 transition-transform

audio_player.style: Floating bottom bar or inline card player.
audio_player.visuals: Dark surface (#121214) with a vivid primary (#E11D48) progress bar. Include Play/Pause, Track Title, Artist, and Time.

digital_product_card.style: High-contrast card. Large image area (1:1 ratio). Bold typography for title and price. Primary 'Add to Cart' or 'Buy Now' button.

home.hero: Full-height (min-h-[90vh]) section. Dark overlay (bg-black/50) over the studio hero image. H1 should be dramatic and left-aligned or perfectly centered with an asymmetric accent element. Include 'Explore Catalog' primary button.
home.featured_sections: Use The Tetris Grid (Bento) for showcasing Top Songs and Featured Gear.

songs_catalog.layout: List-based or dense grid. Each row/card has a Play button. Active track gets a subtle #E11D48 left border highlight.
songs_catalog.interactions: Clicking play updates the global audio player state.

gear_catalog.layout: Asymmetric Bento Grid (grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-8 lg:grid-cols-12). Images should be close-ups or deeply contrasted.
gear_catalog.card_style: Minimal text, let the gear image dominate. Reveal specs on hover.

digital_products.details_page: Split layout: 50% Sticky Image on the left, 50% scrolling content on the right. Include price, description, 'Buy via Stripe' button, and an audio preview if it's a sample pack.

admin_dashboard.layout: Sidebar navigation (bg-[#050505]) + Main content area (bg-[#0A0A0C]). Strict grid hierarchy, tight spacing (p-6).
admin_dashboard.tables: Shadcn Table with minimalist borders. Use high contrast for active/inactive badges.

animations.page_load: Fade up with Framer Motion (y: 20, opacity: 0).
animations.scroll: Use Lenis for smooth momentum scrolling. Parallax effect on the hero background image.

libraries.components: Shadcn UI (highly customized for dark mode)

hero_background.description: Sleek modern music studio setup featuring computer monitors and audio equipment in a dark setting.
hero_background.usage: Main landing page hero section background.

about_studio.description: Close-up of a studio microphone with pop filter and ring light.
about_studio.usage: About us section or studio booking section.

gear_synthesizer_1.description: Black electronic music synthesizer with knobs and jacks

gear_synthesizer_2.description: Black modular synthesizer with colorful stickers

product_sample_pack_placeholder.description: DJ in mask performing for crowd (abstract mood image)
product_sample_pack_placeholder.usage: Placeholder for digital product / sample pack cover

instructions_to_main_agent: Install and use @phosphor-icons/react for all icons. Avoid mixing icon libraries.
Implement the 'Outfit' font for headings and 'Manrope' for body text via Next.js next/font or standard Google Fonts import in index.css.
Do NOT use 'Inter' for headings anywhere.
Ensure the Global Audio Player context is implemented so users can navigate the site while music continues to play.
The e-commerce portion requires Stripe integration. Ensure product detail pages have a clear, high-contrast 'Buy via Stripe' button.
Implement CRUD in the Admin dashboard with Shadcn Table and Dialog components. Use tight spacing (p-4/p-6) in the admin UI.
All interactive elements must have `data-testid` attributes (e.g., `data-testid="play-song-btn"`).
